types1:Item.types1:Name: PlanningAgent
types1:Item.types1:Description: Process that analyzes incoming user emails to identify intent, such as query, feedback, or feature request, and routes the workflow accordingly

process.name: PlanningAgent
process.description: Process that analyzes incoming user emails to identify intent, such as query, feedback, or feature request, and routes the workflow accordingly

options.option: Email address of user to whom the tickets will be assigned
examplejiraindex.pinecone.io - replace with your pinecone index URL
Replace with Jira Project Key from your Jira
exampleragindex.pinecone.io - replace with your rag index Pinecone URL
replace with e-mail recipient addresses, when the user's message is unclear

extData.nvpair: AI Agent for Customer Support Case Processing

assignment.title: Set Email Subject and Email Body

operation.expression: <Generate_Content_Request> <contents> <parts> <text> Here is the email subject: {$temp.Tmp_Email_Subject } along with email body: {$temp.Tmp_Email_Body } Here is the instruction: {$temp.Tmp_Prompt } </text> </parts> <role>user</role> </contents> <generationConfig> <stopSequences>{$temp.Tmp_Prompt_Configuration[1]/stopSequences}</stopSequences> <candidateCount>{$temp.Tmp_Prompt_Configuration[1]/candidateCount }</candidateCount> <maxOutputTokens>{$temp.Tmp_Prompt_Configuration[1]/maxOutputTokens }</maxOutputTokens> <temperature>{$temp.Tmp_Prompt_Configuration[1]/temperature }</temperature> <topP>{$temp.Tmp_Prompt_Configuration[1]/topP }</topP> <topK>{$temp.Tmp_Prompt_Configuration[1]/topK }</topK> </generationConfig> </Generate_Content_Request>
let $title := 'Gemini Uber Planning Agent for - Number of steps- '||$temp.Tmp_Planning_Steps_Count return ipd:setProcessTitle($title)

concat( "Thank you for reaching out to us.", "
", "
", "To assist you better, could you please provide us with some additional details regarding your request? The information you have shared so far is a bit limited, and having more context will help us address your concern more effectively.", "
", "
", "Feel free to reply to this email with the additional information at your earliest convenience.", "
", "
", "Your e-mail:", "
", "Subject: ", $temp.Tmp_Email_Subject, "
", "
", $temp.Tmp_Email_Body, "
", "
", "Kind Regards,", "
", $temp.Tmp_Support_Company_Name )

ns1:SampleData.ns1:Name: clarity_false
feature
feedback
query
query1
query2
query3
query_feature
re:request_for_additional_info
